gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/375)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/375)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِذَا لَمْ يَغَرِ الرَّجُلُ فَهُوَ مَنْكُوسُ الْقَلْبِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad Al Jowhary, from Habeeb Al Khash’amy, from Abdullah Bin Abu Yafour who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘When the man has no sense of honour, so he is of an inverted heart’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from his father from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad al-Jawhariy from Habib al- Khath’amiy from ‘Abd Allah ibn abu Ya’fur who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘One who is not vigilant and protective, his heart is upside down.’”
